description:
Goal:
Make broker contributions safe and reviewable.

Scope:
- adapter spec docs
- CODEOWNERS
- PR template
- broker request template
- broken broker issue template
- DCO/signoff guidance

Acceptance:
- Contributor can add YAML-only broker config from template.
- Security-sensitive docs route to special review.
- License hygiene warning included for copied datasets/code.
title: Community contribution workflow
